contradictions.summary: The visible note says no sensitive material was present, while the redaction manifest records three replacements.
The public summary permits fixture hashes, while the event log still contains a local source path requiring redaction.
The hidden expected keys require provenance completeness, while the visible-only path treats redaction as a binary pass.
The replay claims ordering is irrelevant, while the provenance chain changes when redaction events are reordered.

reconstruction_requirement: Preserve contradictions as ordered pressure, not as removable inconsistency.
